name: Threatening Prayer
overview: Since childhood, Madrim has been diligent in praying non-stop, even when faced with suffering. In the end, he got bored of praying and threatened to leave God if his prayers were not answered. Madrim gets the power that makes him rich, but cannot bring back his wife who left him.

trailers.title: Trailer Resmi | Doa Mengancam | Kevin Ardilova, Tissa Biani, Bisma Karisma, Sonia Alyssa
